Introduction
    Illyasviel von Einzbern, a girl from a parallel world powered by heroes of myth and legend, has vowed to save the world and save Miyu, her friend who is to be sacrificed for the Holy Grail War.

Also known as: Fate/Kaleid Liner Prisma Illya: Licht Nameless Girl
